markdown:
#  Cancel Premium Estimating Subscription for Your Free Procore Account 
##### Limited Release
[Free Procore accounts](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/create-a-free-procore-company-account) are currently only available in the United States and Canada.
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/permissions)


##  Steps 
  1. Log in to your free Procore account.
  2. Click the **Account and Profile** icon.  
This shows as your initials by default, or an avatar if you uploaded an image.
![Clipboard E9b3dd608eb9b4763274375196ed0fe](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/9eaf92a665aa50208e0251e39d8fb7fb/1e5f7dd8894b7d0dfaff6158909301c0/clipboard_e9b3dd608eb9b42b763274375196ed0fe.png?fm=webp)
  3. Click **Account Settings**.
  4. Click the **Subscriptions** tab.
  5. Click the **vertical ellipsis** ![Icon Ellipsis Vertical](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/b6d0fa56ca6a66941a4032499f56aec8/2bb6315cb1db00c907bda1e2ae7a081c/icon-vertical-ellipsis.png?fm=webp&h=15) next to the 'Estimating' header and select **Cancel Subscription**.  
![Free Account Cancel Estimating Subscription](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/afa88f33da90ca5df41ee5a0c08dec87/fdf530889b3ec155f3f82bcc789d5289/free-account-cancel-estimating-subscription.png?fm=webp&h=157)


## See Also

  * [Create a Free Procore Company Account](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/create-a-free-procore-company-account)
title: Cancel Premium Estimating Subscription for Your Free Procore Account
description: How to cancel your company's Premium Estimating subscription for your free Procore company account.
